---
id: fix-cashflow
title: "Manually fix a floating-rate cashflow"
description: "Applies a manual fixing rate to a PROJECTED FLOAT_COUPON cashflow, recalculating the coupon amount using the deal's notional and the cashflow's day count fraction."
sidebar_label: "Manually fix a floating-rate cashflow"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Manually fix a floating-rate cashflow"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/cashflows/{id}/fix"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Applies a manual fixing rate to a PROJECTED FLOAT_COUPON cashflow, recalculating the coupon amount using the deal's notional and the cashflow's day count fraction.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
